candle_rules.sort_order: ascending by time (oldest first, newest last) — enforced in getCandles()
candle_rules.forming_bar: candles[-1] is the FORMING (incomplete) bar — NEVER used for any signal
candle_rules.last_closed: candles[-2] is the last CLOSED bar — used as curr in entry/exit checks
candle_rules.prev_closed: candles[-3] is the bar before last closed — used as prev in entry checks
candle_rules.ma_input: MA20 and SMA200 computed over CLOSED bars only (forming bar excluded)

bias_filter.long_bias: MA20 strictly > SMA200 — bullish trend, LONG entries only
bias_filter.short_bias: MA20 strictly < SMA200 — bearish trend, SHORT entries only
bias_filter.neutral: MA20 == SMA200 — no clear trend, skip all entries
bias_filter.purpose: Trade WITH the macro trend only. Never take counter-trend positions.

entry.long: LONG: GREEN candle + prev RED + close ABOVE MA20 + within 0.5% of MA20 + MA20 > SMA200 + signal fresh within 1.5 bars
entry.short: SHORT: RED candle + prev GREEN + close BELOW MA20 + within 0.5% of MA20 + MA20 < SMA200 + signal fresh within 1.5 bars
entry.order_type: MARKET — fills immediately at best available price

logic.step1_freshness: Max 2 candle closes after signal — entry valid on 1st or 2nd close only. 3rd close onwards = INVALID
logic.step2_bias: MA20 > SMA200 → LONG only | MA20 < SMA200 → SHORT only | equal → skip
logic.step4_reversal: curr GREEN + prev RED for LONG | curr RED + prev GREEN for SHORT
logic.step5_ma20: curr.close >= MA20 for LONG | curr.close <= MA20 for SHORT
logic.step6_proximity: |close - MA20| / MA20 <= 0.005 — must be within 0.5% of MA20, no chasing
logic.purpose: Tight MA20 bounce entries — fresh, close to MA20, trend-aligned only

exit.stop_loss: -3% unrealized PnL on margin — hard stop, checked every 5s, MARKET order
exit.take_profit: +6% unrealized PnL on margin — hard lock, 2:1 R:R, MARKET order
exit.trailing_stop: activates at +3% PnL, trails 2% below peak — locks in gains, MARKET order

ma20_crossover.long: Close LONG: curr.close < MA20 AND prev.close >= prevMA20 (crossed below MA20)
ma20_crossover.short: Close SHORT: curr.close > MA20 AND prev.close <= prevMA20 (crossed above MA20)
ma20_crossover.note: NO freshness guard — exits always fire regardless of candle age

exit.order_type: MARKET — fills immediately at best available price
exit.double_exit_guard: closingPositions Set prevents re-sending close order while one is in-flight

logic.freshness: NONE on exits — exits must never be blocked by age
logic.ma_consistency: currMA and prevMA both computed from closed bars at their respective positions
logic.pnl_method_B: livePrice delta * leverage (fallback when BingX fields unavailable)
logic.tracking: Logs: price%, margin PnL%, USD PnL, daily total, W/L ratio
logic.purpose: Priority exits: stop → take-profit → trail → MA20. Never block an exit.

consolidation_filter.description: DISABLED — MA20 + SMA200 bias + body size is sufficient filter

volume_filter.description: DISABLED — focus on MA20 + SMA200 trend bias only

position_sizing.description: Risk 1% of balance per trade, max $500 margin, 5x leverage, dynamic qty precision

limits.description: Max 20 open, 500/day | fetch:200ms between symbols | order:500ms after placement | scan/exit:5s | stop:-3% TP:+6% trail:+3%→-2%

reversal_entry.description: Counter-trend entries allowed when volume confirms a possible reversal
reversal_entry.long_in_short_bias: MA20 < SMA200 (short trend) + GREEN candle + prev RED + close ≥ MA20 + within 0.5% + RSI<70 + vol ≥ 2x avg → LONG
reversal_entry.short_in_long_bias: MA20 > SMA200 (long  trend) + RED  candle + prev GREEN + close ≤ MA20 + within 0.5% + RSI>30 + vol ≥ 2x avg → SHORT
reversal_entry.volume_baseline: 20-bar avg computed over CLOSED bars PRIOR to curr (excludes forming bar AND curr bar — curr bar excluded to prevent self-inflating the baseline)
reversal_entry.note: Reversal entries use 50% normal size and -1.5% stop (tighter) vs trend entries at full size and -3% stop

risk_management.description: 2:1 R:R | Take profit +6% | Trail activates +3% trailing 2% | Daily target $200 (tracking only, no halt) | Bot runs 24/7 | Circuit breaker: pause 30min if WR < 40% after 10+ trades

deployment.process: bot.js (CONSOLIDATED BOT — single process, 100% of trading)

persistence.description: State lives in Railway environment — restarts pick up from BingX live positions

profitability_tracking.daily_pnl: Realized P&L per trade ($) + daily running total
profitability_tracking.display_format: icon EXIT SIDE SYMBOL price:X% margin:Y% | PnL: $Z | Daily: $D | W/L: N/M (R%)
profitability_tracking.purpose: Real-time profitability visibility in Railway logs

debug.log_level: critical events only (entries, exits, stop-losses, take-profits, trail-stops, scan summaries)
debug.purpose: Minimize Railway log bloat while retaining all actionable info

performance.scan_latency: ~4s per full watchlist scan (5 concurrent workers vs ~20s serial)
performance.entry_latency: 5–8s after candle close (down from 30s+ in v3.2)
performance.exit_poll_passes: 2-pass: Pass1=stop/TP/trail from position data (0 extra API calls), Pass2=parallel MA20 fetch for crossover check only
performance.livePrice_calls: on-demand only — fetched once when a stop/TP/trail exit condition is actually met (not on every position every poll)
performance.slot_fill: immediate — slot-fill scan triggered 1.5s after any successful exit so freed slots are filled without waiting for next 5s interval

changelog.v3.4: Slot-fill scan: scheduleFillScan() fires 1.5s after any successful exit so freed slots are filled immediately (was waiting up to 5s for next interval). scanEntry tagged with reason='slot-fill' for log clarity. exitsFired counter tracks all successful exits in pollExits both pass 1 and pass 2.
changelog.v3.3: 5-bug audit: volAvg excludes curr bar (slice(0,-2) — fixes deflated volume ratio), fetchCandlesBatch 5 concurrent workers (scan 20s→4s, entry latency 30s+→5-8s), 2-pass pollExits (Pass1=no-API stop/TP/trail, Pass2=parallel MA20), livePrice on-demand only (not every poll), getCandles 1-retry with 300ms wait
changelog.v3.2: Counter-trend reversal entries: LONG in short-bias + SHORT in long-bias, gated by ≥2x volume surge. 50% size, -1.5% stop, reversalPositions tracker, volume field added to candles
changelog.v3.1: 8-bug fix: dynamic qty precision, double-exit guard, livePrice for method A, checkDailyReset in pollExits, TDZ cleanup, removed dead DAILY_LOSS_LIM, MAX_DAILY log, closingPositions daily clear
changelog.v3.0: Hedge fund edition: take-profit +6%, trailing stop +3%/−2%, circuit breaker, RSI filter, signal scoring, daily target tracking
changelog.v2.1: 2-candle freshness window, MA20 proximity 0.5%, SMA200 bias, blacklist additions
changelog.v2.0: SMA200 trend bias, stop-loss on margin PnL, inverted signal fix, late entry fix
